At The Ginger Room, we pride ourselves on supporting local business... from our coffee roasters, bakers, and artisans! We offer beneficial beverages that speak to the body, enhance the mind and motivate the spirit.

The Ginger Room is the perfect place to enjoy your favorite cup of tea. Home of over 30 blends of national and international teas. The Ginger Room serves up the most sophisticated cup. We are happy to highlight new selections each month to keep the most inquisitive tea drinker intrigued.
